user.title: OSELIA Hearth
user.description: Connect to the MQTT broker your Hearth gateways use. The gateways are discovered automatically from their retained topics.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the broker

data_description.release_url: A manifest JSON URL, or a GitHub Releases API URL (https://api.github.com/repos/OWNER/REPO/releases/latest). Drives the Firmware update entity.
data_description.github_token: Only for a PRIVATE GitHub repo: a fine-grained token with read-only Contents access. Stored in Home Assistant; the gateway never sees it.

error.feed_error: Could not read the firmware release feed: {error}
